yoe_required: Bachelor's + 3 yrs progressively responsible HR (alt 7-10yr); fits Jamie ~3yr path
sponsorship_note: No no-sponsor clause; OHSU is CAP-EXEMPT (no H-1B lottery) — major value

Partners with TA on workforce planning + Comp on comp-change (partnership facets, not clerical-primary).
notes: CAP-EXEMPT + Portland-hybrid + at-level (BA+3yr) + strategic OD/HRBP (Jamie's wheelhouse, not clerical). Highest-value keeper. iCIMS account-based; likely hCaptcha before submit -> may captcha-stage.
